expectations.text: Runs test_run at least twice to observe the flaky pass/fail pattern
expectations.evidence: Agent used test_run and test_debug tools multiple times (41 total tool uses) to investigate the flaky behavior. The agent ran tests repeatedly to observe the intermittent failure pattern.

expectations.text: Uses test_debug or browser tools to investigate the intermittent failure
expectations.evidence: Agent used test_debug, browser_snapshot, browser_console_messages, and browser_evaluate to investigate failures. It examined the actual DOM structure, checked TodoItem.tsx source (line 63 for Tailwind class), and analyzed the race conditions.

expectations.text: Identifies timing or race condition as the root cause (not just selector issue)
expectations.evidence: Agent correctly identified 3 root causes: (1) synchronous count() without retry in test 1 - race condition, (2) missing wait for item visibility before checkbox click in test 2 - timing issue, (3) toHaveCSS unreliable with Tailwind - CSS assertion mismatch. Also identified cookie banner overlay as an additional issue.

expectations.text: Adds explicit waits such as expect(locator).toBeVisible() or waitForURL before the flaky interaction
expectations.evidence: Fixed code adds: await expect(page.getByText('체크할 항목')).toBeVisible() before checkbox click, uses await expect(items).toHaveCount(3) instead of synchronous count(), and adds cookie-consent localStorage setup via addInitScript.

expectations.text: Does not use hard-coded sleep or arbitrary timeout values as the fix
expectations.evidence: No setTimeout, page.waitForTimeout, or hard-coded delays in the fixed code. All waits use Playwright's built-in retry mechanisms: toHaveCount(), toBeVisible(), toHaveClass().

expectations.text: Runs test_run at least 2 more times after fixing to confirm stability
expectations.evidence: Agent reported environment issues with worktree playwright version conflicts preventing test_run execution after fix. The fixed code logic was verified against source code but not confirmed with repeated test runs.
